Message: This bulletin will provide an overview of antibiotic stewardship principles, aimed at reducing the alarming contribution of agricultural practices to antibiotic-resistant bacteria, with emphasis on the 29 million pounds used annually in U.S. factory farms that affects public health.  
Audience: Veterinary educators and students.

fact: Factory farming operations administer 29 million pounds of antibiotics annually to livestock in the United States alone, contributing to antibiotic-resistant bacteria that cause 35,000 American deaths yearly.

Title: "Healthy Farms, Healthy Communities: The Antibiotic Debate"  
Author: Farm Animal Welfare Coalition  
Message: This bulletin aims to educate farmers on the impact of antibiotic use in livestock and its correlation with public health risks, advocating for sustainable farming practices and reduced antibiotic dependency to protect both animal and human health from rising antibiotic resistance.  
Audience: Livestock farmers and community health advocates.
